title: onkerma globularis
side_effects: Onkerma globularis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps in individuals with sensitive stomachs. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extract can also lead to fatigue, dizziness, and headaches due to the imbalance of essential nutrients. In extreme cases, improper use of Onkerma globularis can cause liver damage and kidney problems, particularly in individuals with pre-existing health conditions. Furthermore, its improper use may also interact with certain medications, exacerbating their side effects and worsening overall health.
